artifactChain.description: MonthlyRevenue releaseDate sync repair + INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH policy
artifactChain.keyOutcome: syncService.ts repaired to write releaseDate on every upsert. Policy: releaseDateSource=INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH, releaseDateConfidence=LOW. TWSE API confirmed to never provide explicit releaseDate — conservative fallback is the only option.
